results.title: Alaska Air says business strengthened despite fuel price surge
results.description: CHICAGO >> Alaska Air Group returned to profitability in June with a double-digit pretax margin despite fuel prices running nearly 70% higher than a year earlier, CEO Ben Minicucci said on the carrier’s quarterly earnings call today.

results.title: R. James Woolsey, CIA director during the Clinton administration, dies at 84
results.description: WASHINGTON — R. James Woolsey, a national security expert who led the CIA for two turbulent years after his appointment by President Bill Clinton, has died. He was 84.
